title: helenium puberulum
intro: Helenium puberulum, also known as Smooth Helenium or Common Helenium, is a flowering plant species in the daisy family, characterized by its bright yellow or orange flowers and hairy leaves. The plant has been used in traditional medicine to treat various health issues, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which make it effective in addressing wounds, skin conditions, and respiratory problems. The health benefits of Helenium puberulum include reducing fever, soothing coughs, and alleviating menstrual cramps, among others. Helenium puberulum can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and its roots and leaves are often used in herbal remedies to harness its medicinal properties.
